name: Prudent Financial Solutions, Inc.
description_short: Prudent Financial Solutions, Inc. is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.8/5 with 646 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Prudent Financial Solutions, Inc. is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 646 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, Prudent Financial Solutions, Inc. has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a credit counseling service, Prudent Financial Solutions, Inc. provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Prudent Financial Solutions, Inc. operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Prudent Financial Solutions, Inc. should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
